_meta.purpose: Three universal first-timer fears, answered honestly. Rendered on /plan-a-visit after a campus is picked, above the form. All three visible at once (no accordion). Copy rules: questions phrased internally (as a visitor would ask themselves), answers lead with honest acknowledgment, no 'Don't worry', no emojis, no exclamation points.

fears.fear: What if I don't know anyone?
fears.answer: About 40% of first-timers come alone. Tell us when you arrive — someone will sit with you. No pressure, no strange introductions. Just a seat with a friendly human next to it.
Come anyway. You won't be asked to do anything — no hands raised, no money expected, no quiz at the end. Lots of people at Futures are figuring out what they believe. You're in good company.

fears.fear: What if I'm the only ___ here?
fears.answer: Look at the faces above. Whoever you are — old, young, single, newly divorced, broke, doubting, doing fine — someone already at this campus is you. They were new once too.
